notes.title: Penny moves in across the hall
notes.note_md:
New neighbour introduces herself. Leonard is **smitten**. Sheldon remains unimpressed by social conventions.

- First appearance of the apartment hallway
- *Knock knock knock* Penny?
- 📺 Pilot episode

notes.title: The spot on the couch
notes.note_md:
Sheldon's preferred seating position is established.

### Rules
1. **No** sitting in the spot
2. Violations may result in passive-aggressive comments
3. Repeated knocking may occur

![Couch](https://via.placeholder.com/320x120/5c6bc0/fff?text=The+Spot)

notes.title: Elevator out of order
notes.note_md:
Building elevator has been broken since **2003**. Stairs are the only option.

Sheldon finds this suboptimal. 🛗❌

notes.title: Raj can now speak to women
notes.note_md:
When under the influence of alcohol, Rajesh Koothrappali gains the ability to speak in the presence of women.

> So far only works at parties.

🍷🗣️

notes.title: Roommate agreement amendments
notes.note_md:
Sections **47 through 51** added:

- Shared refrigerator usage
- Bathroom schedule
- Dispute resolution: *Rock-Paper-Scissors-Lizard-Spock*

```
Scissors cuts Paper
Paper covers Rock
...
```

notes.title: Howard's mother
notes.note_md:
Mrs. Wolowitz is now a recurring character. She is **heard but never seen**.

Volume set to maximum. 📢

notes.title: Amy Farrah Fowler
notes.note_md:
Neurobiologist introduced via online dating.

Sheldon describes her as *"the female equivalent of me, minus the need for a second bathroom."*

🔬❤️

notes.title: Bernadette Rostenkowski
notes.note_md:
Howard's love interest.

- Microbiologist
- Part-time waitress
- Has a **surprisingly assertive** voice when needed

![Bernadette](https://via.placeholder.com/200x100/ff8a65/fff?text=Bernadette)

notes.title: Wedding: Howard and Bernadette
notes.note_md:
### Wedding highlights

- Howard marries Bernadette 💒
- Mrs. Wolowitz attends
- Neil Diamond's *Sweet Caroline* is performed
- Sheldon delivers a speech about the **Mars rover**

🎉🎊

notes.title: Soft kitty
notes.note_md:
Documented procedure for when Sheldon is sick:

1. Sing *Soft Kitty* (twice)
2. Alternative: *I am the very model of a modern major general* in reverse

🐱🎵

notes.title: Nobel Prize (pending)
notes.note_md:
Sheldon and Amy's super-asymmetry work may one day be recognised.

Sheldon has already written his acceptance speech. **Multiple times.**

🏆📜
